verses.text: Josiah' tapa Jehoiakim, Judah gam kumpi ahih laitakin Topa in kei hong hopih a
“Rekhab behte kiangah pai in la, amau tawh na kiho khit ciangin Topa' biakinn-ah hong pai in la, inndei khat sungah tumpihin, tua ciangin a dawn dingin leenggahzu pia in,” ci-in a hong sawl hi
Tua ciangin Habazziniah' tupa ahi Jeremiah dang khat' tapa, Jaazaniah leh a sanggamte, a tate khempeuh leh Rekhab behte khempeuh ka sam hi

Amaute, Topa' biakinnsung, kumpi uliante' inndei gei, Shallum' tapa, kongpi uk biakinn upa lian Maaseiah' inndei tung sanah a om, Igdaliah' tapa, Pasian' mi ahi Hanan' tate' inndei sungah ka lutpih hi
Tua ciangin Rekhab behte' mai-ah leenggahzu a dimin a kikoih hai leh keute ka pia a, leenggahzu dawn un, ci-in ka sawl hi

Ahih hangin amaute in, “Kote in leenggahzu ka ne kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Rekhab' tapa, ka pu uh Jonadab in thu hong pia a, ‘Note-a kipan na ta na tute un leenggahzu na ne ngei peuhmah kei ding uh hi

Inn na lam kei ding uh a, khai na tuh kei ding uh hi. Singno na suan kei ding uh a, leenggah lo na bawl kei ding uh hi. Ahih hangin na ten'pakna uh gamsungah sawtveipi na ten'theihna dingun na nuntak hun sungteng uh puanbuk sungah na teng ding uh hi,’ hong ci hi
Kote in Rekhab' tapa ka pu uh Jonadab' hong thupiak khempeuh ka mang uh a, ka nuntak hun sungteng uh ko-a kipan ka zite uh, ka tapate uh leh ka tanute uh in leenggahzu dawnloin
ten'na ding inn ka lam kei uh hi. Leenggah huan, lo leh khaici bangmah ka nei kei uh hi
Ka pu uh Jonadab' hong sawl bangbangin ka mang uh a, puanbuk sungah ka teng den uh hi

Ahih hangin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in hih gam hong sim ciangin kote in, ‘Hong pai un. Khaldea galkapte leh Syria galkapte kihta ihih manin Jerusalem khua-ah pai ni,’ ka kici uh a, tua mah bangin tu-in Jerusalem khua-ah ka teng uh hi,” a hong ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a
“Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in kong cihin-ah: Pai in la Judah mite kiang leh Jerusalem khua-a teng mite' kiangah, Topa in: Ka thuhilhna hong sangloin ka thu hong ngailo ding na hi uh hiam

Rekhab' tapa Jonadab in a suanlekhakte tungah leenggahzu a dawn lohna ding uh a thupiakna amaute in zui uh a, tuni ciangdong bangmah a dawn kei uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a pu uh' thupiakna a mang uh hi. Keimah in note kong hopih tawntung hangin ka thu nong mang kei uh hi

Ka nasem ahi kamsangte khempeuh note kiangah hong sawl tawntungin, ‘Tu-in note khempeuh na hoihlohna uh panin kihei un la, na gamtat hoihlote uh kipuahpha un. Pasian dangte nung delh loin a na na sep kei nak uh leh note leh na pu na pate uh kiangah ka piak gam sungah na teng ding uh hi,’ ci-in note tungah hong gen uh hi. Ahih hangin note in na bil uh nong ngat kei uh a, ka thu nong ngai kei uh hi
Rekhab' tapa Jonadab' suante in a pu uh thupiakna a man' uh hangin hih mite in ka thu hong manglo uh hi

Tua ahih manin keimah Topa Vanglian Pasian in kong genin-ah: En un, Judah mite leh Jerusalem khua-ah a teng mi khempeuh tungah a tung dingin ka gen khiatsa khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau tungah ka gen hangin amaute in ka thu hong ngailo uh a, amaute ka sap hangin hong dawngkiklo uh hi, ci hi, ci-in va gen in,” a hong ci hi

Tua ciangin kei zong Rekhab behte kiangah, “Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in hong genin-ah: Na pu uh Jonadab' hong thupiakna mangin, a hong thuhilhna bangin zui-in, a hong sawl khempeuh sem khin na hih manun
Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in hong cihin-ah: Rekhab' tapa Jonadab' suante' lak panin ka mai-a ding ka nasem ding pasal khat beek a kitasam ngei kei ding hi, hong ci hi,” ci-in ka gen hi.
